description.overview: Despite the name, the Small Münsterländer is a medium-sized versatile hunting dog. They're highly trainable and make excellent family companions.
description.history: The Small Münsterländer originated in Germany.
description.temperament: Known for being intelligent, trainable, versatile.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their medium-length, dense, sleek coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Despite the name, the Small Münsterländer is a medium-sized versatile hunting dog. They're highly trainable and make excellent family companions.
